name: Premium Kitten Essentials Starter Pack
description: Give your new kitten the perfect welcome with our Kitten Starter Bundle! This all-in-one set includes everything your little furry friend needs to feel comfortable and happy in their new home. Inside the bundle, you’ll find: 1 Reflex Premium Kitten Food Chicken 2kg 2 Reflex Pocket Treats Shiny Coat 60g 2 Miglior Cat Unico Mousse Pouch 85g (Turkey) 1 Poline Cat Litter - Odourless 5l Cat Litter Box + Scoop Generic Glow Cat Collar (Pink or Purple) 1 Cat Toy Fun Mix Perfect for new kitten owners, this bundle makes the first days with your kitten easy and stress-free. Everything is carefully chosen to help your kitten grow strong and happy!
